name: Sheila O'Connell, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: counting down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

Tomorrow's a big day, and I wanted to check in with you. If you haven't contributed to Chris ahead of our crucial deadline, **[now is the time to do it.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce5e/1909332490/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom830?refcode=em92915_3ND&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+now+is+the+time+to+do+it&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")**

Why? Because we need a leader like Chris in the Senate. He's the only one in this race with a proven record of effective leadership and achieving real results for Marylanders. But here's the thing: he can't win if we don't have his back.

**We 've set a goal to raise $30,000 before midnight tomorrow, and we're falling short. **

That's why I'm asking: **[will you consider contributing before tomorrow's Federal Election Commission deadline? A contribution of any amount will help us close the gap.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce5b/1909332490/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom830?refcode=em92915_3ND&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+will+you+consider+contributing+before+to&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce50/1909332490/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em92915_3ND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Donate+5+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")** **[Donate $25 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce68/1909332490/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em92915_3ND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Donate+25+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")** **[Donate $50 instantly>>](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce7e/1909332490/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em92915_3ND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Donate+50+instantlygtgt&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")** **[Or, donate another amount.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce77/1909332490/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em92915_3ND&amount=5.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")** Right now, we're short of hitting our goal. But I know that supporters like you are going to come through, and together, we'll make sure Chris has the resources he needs to win.

Let's send Chris to the Senate to fight for us and get things done -- just like he always has. **[Click now to contribute any amount before the deadline.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ffa/70cdc2ba/47abdff4/395ce0f/1909332490/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom830?refcode=em92915_3ND&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=7+-+Click+now+to+contribute+any+amount+befor&utm_campaign=em92915_3ND&source=em92915_3ND")**

Thank you,

Sheila O'Connell
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen for Senate

name: Josh Wolf
subject: Fwd: Decisions, decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend --

Here at Murphy for Senate HQ, we're counting down the hours until the FEC deadline. **There are only about 24 hours left and we haven 't hit our $50,000 goal yet.**

**I know it 's late -- but we're running out of time.** And like Patrick said, we need to take action now before the deadline.

[**Rush your contribution -- even if it 's just $5 or $10 -- tonight.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae215f/738133e4/3aaa69f0/7f8cc169/418667175/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150929pm2?refcode=pme150929pm2_b&recurring=true")

Thanks.

Josh \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Patrick Murphy
Date: Tues, Sep 29, 2015
Subject: Decisions, decisions Friends,

We all have decisions to make.

We learned on Friday that the Speaker of the House made the decision to resign from Congress. His choice leaves space for the Tea Party to gain a huge advantage in Washington -- making the dysfunction worse than ever.

**The best thing we can do to mitigate the Tea Party damage is win the Florida Senate race, and help Democrats take back control of the Senate.**

So there's one big decision facing you today, friends -- **will you take action, right now, to help us win?**

[**The FEC deadline is in 24 hours and we haven 't reached our $50,000 goal yet. Will you contribute today to help us reach it?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae215f/738133e4/3aaa69f0/7f8cc169/418667175/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150929pm2?refcode=pme150929pm2_b&recurring=true")

I decided to run for Senate for the same reason I decided to run for Congress -- Washington is full of politicians who don't seem to want to get anything done.

I'm a CPA, so I do things a little differently than normal politicians. I'm not afraid of consensus and compromise -- in fact, I strive for it. Because that's how you make things work.

**Today, I hope you 'll make the decision to fight beside me. **[**If you can, make a contribution of $5 or more, and make sure we reach our $50,000 goal before tomorrow 's deadline.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae215f/738133e4/3aaa69f0/7f8cc169/418667175/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150929pm2?refcode=pme150929pm2_b&recurring=true")

Whether you decide to give or not -- thank you for being a part of this team. I couldn't do it without you.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae215f/738133e4/3aaa69f0/7f8cc16a/418667175/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

---

Alright Peter, today's the day.

The third fundraising quarter ends at midnight tonight. With your help, it will be our most successful quarter to date. I hate to ask this again, but it's so important that I must...

**If you haven't yet made a donation,**[**I hope you will do so now**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30706617:WjLHUnmNq:m:1:876315805:13847CAD13472C99AAF606F8A9E16FA6:r)**.

If you've already given, **[**please think about doing so again, even if it's just a few dollars**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30706617:WjLHUnmNq:m:1:876315805:13847CAD13472C99AAF606F8A9E16FA6:r)**.

**When I was first thinking about entering this race, I knew that something was brewing across America. I had a feeling in my gut that people were so disgusted with the political class they were willing to embrace a new kind of leadership.

I decided to run for President not to appeal to this frustration, but to offer something better.

America was founded upon the idea that "We the People" are all equal, that we all have something to offer, and that we as individuals are the only rightful center of power.

If through our policies we can once again embrace these foundational principles, our future will be one of unbounded potential.

The sheer number of people who have donated their hard-earned dollars to my campaign, and the reception that I've received from my fellow Americans wherever I have traveled, gives me great hope that "We the People" are getting ready to make history and leave the political class scratching their collective heads for years to come.

[**Please help me close this critical quarter in a huge way by making a donation now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30706617:WjLHUnmNq:m:1:876315805:13847CAD13472C99AAF606F8A9E16FA6:r)

Thank you for your faith in me, and your faith in the future of this great nation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: Deep trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

You've been lied to. Again and again. I have too.

We've been asked to give everything we have to try and save this country -- to get Big Government off our backs -- and nothing ever changes.

The Washington Machine keeps humming along -- as politicians in BOTH parties don't dare do anything but whittle around the edges of Big Government.

But Fellow Conservative, today is your chance to help me send a loud and clear message that the days of broken promises are OVER!

A brand new _Reuters_ poll released this morning shows my campaign is surging in the polls and I've now leaped into 5th place over the past five days.

But the FEC's September 30th midnight deadline is just hours away. And my campaign has a goal of raising $450,000 before midnight tonight. It's critical we reach our goal.

**[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution at once to help make sure I hit my goal and continue my surge in the polls](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30711092:szSS1BmNL:m:1:879035888:E7C91A46FCB30FD8BE1C309C82D7082C:r)**?

Unlike so many of my opponents in this race, I'm not interested in just whittling down the Washington Machine. I'm interested in DESTROYING it once and for all.

Instead of false bravado masquerading as principle, my campaign is offering real plans to gut Big Government and restore liberty to the American people by:

*** _Cutting taxes for every American_. My 14.5% flat tax would return $2 TRILLION to the American people over 10 years, create 1.4 million new jobs and grow our GDP by a whopping 10%. No other candidates' tax plan comes close to mine;

*** _Repealing ALL of ObamaCare_. What's the purpose of the Republican Party if we can't repeal Democrat boondoggles? There's much that needs to be ended and repealed in Washington, and ObamaCare is a great place to start;

*** _Imposing term limits for Members of Congress_. Career politicians are always the ones telling us what we "can't" get done, aren't they? If they "can't" do what we elect them to do, let's send them packing!

*** _Forcing Congress to read the bills they pass_. Bad things come in BIG, thousand-page packages in Washington, D.C. This is how slick lobbyists shower their corporate cronies with special goodies and insider deals while hardworking Americans get stuck with the bill. We need to end corruption in Washington and this would be a strong start;

*** _Protecting the ENTIRE Bill of Rights_. Recent polls show roughly half of Americans view government as an immediate threat to their liberty. All I can say is, "what in the world are the other half of Americans thinking?" One thing I can promise you, if we keep electing politicians who keep attacking our Bill of Rights, ALL Americans will regret it!

This is my plan to completely dismantle and DESTROY the Washington Machine.

It's the plan Big Government members of BOTH parties fear most.

This is the most important FEC deadline of this campaign.

So if you want to stop being lied to by phonies who never hand you and me anything but broken promises, now is the time to take action.

Fellow Conservative, I've stood up to ALL of them. And I've won.

That's true whether it was my first race in Kentucky where the entire Republican establishment chose to back my "next-in-line" tax-and-spend Republican opponent -- or in my recent victory forcing the worst provisions of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" to expire.

But both of those victories were only possible with the support of good folks like you.

**[So please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30711092:szSS1BmNL:m:1:879035888:E7C91A46FCB30FD8BE1C309C82D7082C:r)**.

The deadline is rapidly approaching.

And, as I mentioned, my campaign has a goal of hitting $450,000 by midnight tonight.

Right now, Fellow Conservative, we're still short of reaching that goal.

I'm counting on your help. **[Please chip in a contribution before midnight tonight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30711092:szSS1BmNL:m:1:879035888:E7C91A46FCB30FD8BE1C309C82D7082C:r)**.

Rand Paul

**Subject** : I'm afraid this is bad news

Fellow Conservative:

The status quo equals failure.

The American people are FED UP because too many Republicans in Washington treat surrender as the first option.

As a result, the Republican nominating contest is wide open.

**[And with just under 10 hours remaining until the September 30th deadline, it's vital you chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30715066:W2-aoBmNA:m:1:879035888:A26FF7BFCA4E9B9EAA02E4FB66A1982F:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, I spoke on the Senate floor today about my opposition to the continuing resolution to fund the government.

If you want a President who will keep piling on $18 TRILLION in our national debt, there will always be a Bush or a Clinton for you to pick from.

The truth is, the continuing resolution rammed through the Senate today was a steaming pile of the same old madness.

With a continuing resolution, the Big Government gravy train chugs along.

ObamaCare is funded.

Planned Parenthood still draws over $500 million in taxpayer money.

Many excuses are made for why Republicans must surrender today in order to fight some other time in the future, which never seems to materialize.

Thanks to you, Republicans won stunning sweeps of both houses of Congress...but nothing seems to change.

The bottom line is, under the plans I've pushed my colleagues to adopt, it would take 60 votes to fund Planned Parenthood.

It would take 60 votes to fund ObamaCare.

With our nation mired so deeply in debt, this would be a huge step in cutting spending.

Republicans' refusal to use the power of the purse has created a grassroots uprising that has already caused John Boehner to announce he is resigning as Speaker of the House at the end of October.

And the establishment politicians all the pundits assumed would waltz to the GOP nomination are being rejected by the voters.

My campaign has made a TV ad detailing why I'm the one constitutional conservative in this race with a plan to defeat the Washington Machine.

**[I hope you will take a few moments to watch it](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30715066:W2-aoBmNA:m:1:879035888:A26FF7BFCA4E9B9EAA02E4FB66A1982F:r)**.

body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
Today is a very important day for our political revolution.
At midnight, we'll close the books on our first full Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline of the campaign. Shortly after, we'll announce the number of individual contributions powering our movement.
We have a chance to send an unmistakable message about the size and strength of our campaign to the political media, billionaire class, and to the super PACs already attacking us. So I need to ask you directly: can I count on you to make a contribution right now?
**[Contribute $24.86-- the average donation we've received in the last week -- to our campaign and we will hit our goal of 1 million online contributions ahead of tonight's official fundraising deadline.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb22cd/43f17890/56676a16/621fe58d/1553573211/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/1-million?refcode=em150930am-full")**
I don't go around asking millionaires and billionaires asking for money. This movement is powered by working Americans who have had enough of our government working exclusively for a handful of wealthy individuals. I am very proud of that fact.
Thank you for standing with me.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

body:
| Hi Friend --

I'll be honest with you, Friend. **I'm cheap**. Fighting against the Washington Establishment will do that to a candidate. From day one of this campaign, I made the decision not to spend precious time with donors, as other candidates have done.

I'd rather spend that time with folks like you, talking about the issues, and hearing what you have to say.

**But there's a downside to running a frugal campaign -- reality!** The fact is, we do need some money to pay for things like gasoline to get me through all 99 counties in Iowa, food for volunteers, modest pay for our field staff, and keeping our website up and running so I can reach as many folks as possible.

There are plenty more of these small expenses that keep this campaign going every day, so I won't bore you with the details.

**But I will ask you for a favor, Friend**. Can you **[chip in just a few dollars to keep us going](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=im_cheap_s&n=1)**? Every little bit will help us with these small, yet vital, expenses to take us through to victory.

Thank you for your support!

\-- Rick

| |

Good evening Peter,

We're just hours away from the critical third quarter fundraising deadline.
|

**Please make sure to read Dr. Carson's email from this morning,[and make one last donation before midnight tonight](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30718009:sKKGZBmGN:m:1:876315805:F2EDC26E812094EA9652E89F808640B5:r).**

Barry

**From** : Ben Carson
**Subject: Today's the day**
**Date:** September 30, 2015 at 9:32:15 AM EDT
**To:** Barry Bennett

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30718009:sKKGZBmGN:m:1:876315805:F2EDC26E812094EA9652E89F808640B5:r)

Alright Peter, today's the day.

The third fundraising quarter ends at midnight tonight. With your help, it will be our most successful quarter to date. I hate to ask this again, but it's so important that I must...

**If you haven't yet made a donation,**[**I hope you will do so now**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30718009:sKKGZBmGN:m:1:876315805:F2EDC26E812094EA9652E89F808640B5:r)**.

**When I was first thinking about entering this race, I knew that something was brewing across America. I had a feeling in my gut that people were so disgusted with the political class they were willing to embrace a new kind of leadership.

I decided to run for President not to appeal to this frustration, but to offer something better.

America was founded upon the idea that "We the People" are all equal, that we all have something to offer, and that we as individuals are the only rightful center of power.

If through our policies we can once again embrace these foundational principles, our future will be one of unbounded potential.

The sheer number of people who have donated their hard-earned dollars to my campaign, and the reception that I've received from my fellow Americans wherever I have traveled, gives me great hope that "We the People" are getting ready to make history and leave the political class scratching their collective heads for years to come.

[**Please help me close this critical quarter in a huge way by making a donation now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30718009:sKKGZBmGN:m:1:876315805:F2EDC26E812094EA9652E89F808640B5:r)

Thank you for your faith in me, and your faith in the future of this great nation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Bill Clinton
subject: Can you help Hillary out before midnight?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary needs you. | Friend --

I haven't written to you yet during this election, but today's too important to stay on the sidelines.

[**Hillary 's campaign has a major fundraising deadline tonight, and she needs your help. Will you donate what you can before midnight?**](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/deadline/?amount=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ses&utm_campaign=20150930wjc_eoq)

A quick story:

When I met Hillary a long time ago, she was one of just 27 women in her graduating class in law school, and she was a star. When she graduated, she had lucrative job offers. But she decided not to go to a big firm in D.C. or New York.

Instead, Hillary went to work for the Children's Defense Fund, going door to door to collect stories about the lack of schooling for children with disabilities. Those stories helped push forward historic legislation requiring us to do a better job educating the kids who need our help the most.

I've watched Hillary for more than forty years. She doesn't do things for the title, the pay, or the accolades. Hillary takes on fights because she cares about the people she could help if she wins -- the working families, women, and children who could do so much better with even a little support.

That's the kind of president she'll be. But she'll only get a chance to show it if we stand with her today.

**[Hillary needs us more than ever right now. That's why I'm asking you to donate $1 or more before midnight and stand with her.](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/deadline/?amount=1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ses&utm_campaign=20150930wjc_eoq)**

Thanks,

Bill Clinton

body:
Hey Friend - I just checked the numbers and I'm a little bit nervous about hitting our goal. **[We're less than 12 hours away from a critical FEC deadline and we're still 450 contributions away from our goal, can you help?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fc5/70cdc2ba/47aa617e/395c11a/2241984655/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom815?refcode=em93015_1nd&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Wersquore+less+than+12+hours+away+from+a&utm_campaign=em093015_1nd&source=em093015_1nd")**

My job as finance director is to keep us on track and to do that, I need your help to hit our goals each and every month. Without you on our side, our campaign won't have the resources we need to fight back against the radical Tea Party which has taken over the Republican party and pushed us to the brink of a very costly shutdown.

subject: A critical deadline.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Hi, Friend. I need your help. I'm writing to ask a personal favor.

**Today is our fundraising deadline, and we’ll be going public with how much money we’ve raised.**

It’s critical that we have a strong show of support from patriots like you, so we can prove to everyone that I don’t need to spend time courting Wall Street donors to win Iowa and take our message of doing what’s right for hard-working American families, defeating Radical Islam, and working to prosecute Planned Parenthood nationwide.

With each passing day, the values that we champion are being threatened, and with each passing day, our voice gets more drowned out. But **we have an opportunity** to show the country how committed we are to the traditional American values I’ve talked with thousands of Iowans about.

Are you able to **[chip in $25, $50, or $100](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=deadline&n=1)** today, to keep me on the road as the only candidate taking on the issues that matter the most to us?

As always, I thank you for all the support you’ve given me. I won’t forget it.

\-- Rick
